title: Creative Chaos - Guns, Cars & Blocks
description: "Creative Chaos" merges building, guns & cars in one modpack! Construct with 100+ new blocks, battle with realistic firearms, and race drivable vehicles. Perfect for builders & action lovers! 🏗️🔫🚗
body:
Welcome to Creative Chaos, the ultimate Minecraft modpack for builders, engineers, and action lovers! This pack combines aesthetic creativity, explosive firepower, and high-speed vehicles to give you the ultimate sandbox experience.
Features:

🔹 Expanded Creative Building – Unleash your creativity with hundreds of new decorative blocks, furniture, and construction materials. From modern architecture to sci-fi designs, build anything you imagine!

🔹 Guns & Warfare – Arm yourself with an arsenal of realistic firearms, explosives, and tactical gear. Engage in intense combat with custom guns, bullet physics, and destructible environments.

🔹 Driveable Cars & Vehicles – Hit the road (or off-road!) with fully functional cars, trucks, and motorcycles. Customize your rides, race with friends, or cruise through your world in style.

🔹 Tech & Gadgets – Enhance your gameplay with high-tech gadgets, drones, and interactive machines—perfect for automation or just messing around.

🔹 Optimized & Balanced – Smooth performance with carefully selected mods that work together seamlessly. No crashes, just pure fun!
Perfect For:

✔ Builders who want more creative freedom
✔ Players who love action-packed gunplay
✔ Fans of vehicle mods and racing
✔ Anyone who wants a fresh, dynamic Minecraft experience

Download now and dive into a world where creativity meets chaos! 🚗💥🏗️

(Requires Minecraft Forge Version 1.20.1)
